top_stories.title: E-wallet boom boosts financial inclusion in first quarter
top_stories.summary: Filipino adults with formal financial accounts rose to 58 percent in the first quarter, driven by the rapid adoption of e-wallets, according to a survey commissioned by the Bangko Sentral ng Pilipinas.
